vacancies.note: Vacancies in adult social care (care homes and home care), England

internationalVisas.note: International care worker visas granted under Health and Care Worker visa route

hourlyPay.note: Average hourly pay for care home workers in England (£)

sources.name: Skills for Care
sources.dataset: The State of the Adult Social Care Sector and Workforce in England

sources.name: Home Office
sources.dataset: Health and Care Worker visa statistics

sources.name: Skills for Care
sources.dataset: Adult social care workforce pay analysis

metadata.methodology: Vacancy figures from Skills for Care workforce estimates based on CQC-registered provider data. Health and Care Worker visa grants from Home Office immigration statistics. Hourly pay from Skills for Care workforce survey of registered providers — mean hourly wage for care workers (Band 2 equivalent).
knownIssues: 2020 vacancies lower due to furlough reducing reported vacancies
Health and Care Worker visa figures include both care homes and domiciliary care
30% turnover rate estimated from Skills for Care leavers data — actual churn may be higher in small providers
